holdings.infoBox: XOMX is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily XOM Bull 2X ETF (XOMX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Exxon Mobil Corporation stock. XOMX was launched on Apr 23, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
